title: LeoTweaks Gapple Counter
description:
Counts and shows how many Golden Apples someone is holding in Vanilla Minecraft. Useful for PVP!
No Mods required.
body:
### This Resourcepack gives all Golden Apples their own distinction, without requiring any mods.

---
Once you're familiar with the pack, you'll be able to tell how many Golden Apples someone has at just a glance!

_Beware that this pack may not be allowed on some PVP servers. Use it at your own risk!_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BZ9DCBM9st0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Golden Apple Outline Categories, depending on count:
- **1x**   ❤️ Dark Red
- **2x** → **3x**  💖 Red
- **4x** → **6x** 🧡 Orange
- **7x** → **9x**  💛 Yellow
- **10x** → **19x**  💚 Green
- **20x** → **29x**  🩵 Cyan
- **30x** → **39x**  🩵 Light Blue
- **40x** → **49x**  💙 Dark Blue
- **50x** → **59x**  💜 Purple
- **60x** → **64x**  🩷 Pink
